## AuthHook type

Async-capable auth hook used by the built-in Pi WebSocket route.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AuthHook<Session = unknown> = (
  auth: AuthHookInput,
  context: RequestHookContext<Session>,
) => MaybePromise<RequestHookResult<Session>>;
```

**References:** [AuthHookInput](./pi-ws.authhookinput.md)<!-- -->, [RequestHookContext](./pi-ws.requesthookcontext.md)<!-- -->, [RequestHookResult](./pi-ws.requesthookresult.md)
